# misp_setting (Data Source)

Read the current value of a MISP server setting by its dotted name (e.g. `MISP.baseurl`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_setting" "baseurl" {
  name = "MISP.baseurl"
}

output "misp_baseurl" {
  value = data.misp_setting.baseurl.value
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `level` (Number)
- `type` (String)
- `value` (String)
